# Hand-Drawn Diagrams

## Overview
Creates diagrams, flowcharts, and visual explanations with a hand-drawn / sketch aesthetic using tools like RoughJS, Excalidraw, or hand-drawn SVG filters.

## Style Characteristics
- Irregular, hand-drawn lines (not perfectly straight)
- Rough fills with slight texture
- Hand-written style fonts (Caveat, Kalam, Comic Neue)
- Limited color palette (pencil, highlighter accents)
- Minimal decoration — focus on clarity

## Workflow
1. Understand the concept or flow to diagram
2. Choose the right diagram type (flowchart, sequence, mind map, system diagram)
3. Draft structure — boxes, arrows, labels
4. Apply hand-drawn styling via RoughJS or similar
5. Add annotations and callouts where helpful
6. Keep it readable — adequate spacing and font size
